channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: AI boom puts SK Hynix on the cusp of $1 trillion market value
item.description: South Korea is at the forefront of Asia's AI boom, with SK Hynix nearing a $1 trillion market value, following Samsung Electronics' recent milestone. Driven by surging AI demand for memory chips, SK Hynix shares have seen significant growth. [Samsung]

item.title: Cisco to cut about 4,000 jobs in AI-focused restructuring as orders surge
item.description: Cisco announced nearly 4,000 job cuts as part of a strategic restructuring to boost investment in AI and growth areas. The networking giant also raised its annual revenue forecast, driven by a significant surge in hyperscaler orders for AI infrastructure, lea… [Cisco]

item.title: 3M joins AMD, Meta, Oracle, Cisco, Arista to standardize expanded beam optical connectivity for AI data centers
item.description: The coalition's standardization efforts could accelerate AI infrastructure development, reduce costs, and prevent vendor lock-in, fostering innovation. The post 3M joins AMD, Meta, Oracle, Cisco, Arista to standardize expanded beam optical connectivity for AI… [Meta, Oracle, Cisco, AMD]

item.title: UK chip startup Fractile raises $220m in Series B funding round
item.description: Fractile secured $220m in a Series B funding round to advance its efforts in developing next-generation inference hardware for AI systems.

item.title: Wells Fargo sees Nvidia stock rising over 40% driven by AI
item.description: Nvidia's potential 40% stock rise underscores the transformative impact of AI infrastructure growth on tech investment strategies. The post Wells Fargo sees Nvidia stock rising over 40% driven by AI appeared first on Crypto Briefing. [Nvidia]
